title: Toyota Hilux Double Cab — Dollar Rent A Car, Buenos Aires Ezeiza International Airport

policies.licenseRequirements: A full, valid driving license held for at least 1 year is required at pickup.
policies.lateReturnPolicy: A 29-minute grace period applies; afterwards an extra day is charged at the daily rate.
policies.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before pickup. Within 48 hours, one day's rental is charged.
policies.noShowPolicy: No-shows are charged the full prepaid amount, or three days' rental for pay-at-desk bookings.
policies.borderCrossingRules: The vehicle may not be taken across international borders.
policies.additionalDriverRules: Additional drivers must meet the same age/license requirements and be registered at the counter (daily fee applies).
policies.smokingPolicy: All vehicles are strictly non-smoking; a deep-cleaning fee applies for violations.
policies.petPolicy: Pets are not permitted except certified service animals.
policies.tollPolicy: Tolls are the renter's responsibility; some vehicles include an electronic toll tag billed after return.

insuranceOptions.name: Basic Cover
insuranceOptions.description: Collision damage waiver and theft protection with a standard excess — included in every rate.

insuranceOptions.name: Premium Protection
insuranceOptions.description: Reduces the excess to a fraction of the standard amount and adds glass, tyre, and undercarriage cover.

insuranceOptions.name: Zero Excess Package
insuranceOptions.description: Full peace of mind: no excess payable for damage or theft, including glass, tyres, roof, and undercarriage.

insuranceOptions.name: Theft Protection
insuranceOptions.description: Covers theft of the vehicle (excess applies). Included in every rate.

insuranceOptions.name: Third Party Liability
insuranceOptions.description: Legally required third-party injury and property liability cover — always included.

insuranceOptions.name: Personal Accident Insurance
insuranceOptions.description: Medical and accidental-death cover for the driver and passengers.

insuranceOptions.name: Glass & Tyre Protection
insuranceOptions.description: Covers windscreen chips, glass breakage, and tyre damage not included in basic cover.

insuranceOptions.name: Roadside Assistance Plus
insuranceOptions.description: 24/7 breakdown response, lockout service, flat battery, and misfuelling assistance.
